title: Predicate Custom Models Example
description: An example resource pack for use with the Predicate custom models mod that has the option for Mjolnir, and a no-face mask.
body:
# This is an example resource pack

An example resource pack to be used with [Predicate Custom Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/predicate-custom-models) mod.

This gives the trident a Mjolnir model if you give it CustomModelData:1000 or set the condition of the players name as your username. 

As well has the option of no-face mask for diamond helmets.


## How to obtain

To obtain these models you can use `/give USERNAME minecraft:trident{CustomModelData:1000}`
 and `/give USERNAME minecraft:diamond_helmet{CustomModelData:1000}`
